Maharaja spaces is a developer with over 35 years of experience, primarily known for luxury projects in hyderabad. Maharaja ikon park marks their significant entry into the bangalore market, focusing on "english heritage" design and sustainable livingThe maharaja ikon park project stands out for its english heritage-Inspired architecture and a focus on multigenerational living. Its most distinct features include: 
Individualized luxury Private lift provision: Most 4 bhk triplex villa layouts include a designated provision for a private internal lift, enhancing accessibility across all three floors.Functional add-Ons: Each unit is designed with dedicated staff/servant quarters, a large store room, and a home theatre/media room.Grand design: The villas feature high ceilings, tall doors, and double-Height living spaces to create a grand, airy atmosphere. Sustainability & smart features
Eco-Conscious living: The project integrates net-Zero energy concepts with rooftop solar panels, electric vehicle (Ev) charging facilities, and greywater recycling systems.Smart home readiness: Villas are built to be smart home ready and include high-End provisions like vrv/vrf air-Conditioning.Green infrastructure: Residents have access to a unique infinity tree walk, part of the 20,000 sq. Ft. Of dedicated green zones and play areas. Community & connectivity

Clubhouse featuring a rooftop temperature-Controlled pool, a mini-Theatre, and professional sports courts for badminton and squash.Strategic location: Situated directly beside the 138-Acre brigade orchards smart township, it offers a "township within a township" feel with low-Density living (Only 133 units across 9.5 acres)
